final:
module binary_counter(
    input               clk,
    input               rst_n,
    output reg  [4-1:1-1]   count
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        if (count == 4'b1111) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
